title: lespedeza japonica var. intermedia
intro: Lespedeza japonica var. intermedia, also known as Japanese bush clover, is a perennial legume native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Japanese bush clover include its ability to support cardiovascular health, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Japanese bush clover can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance in the body.
